summary: This is a LEGENDARY-tier trader with genuinely exceptional domain expertise in Russia-Ukraine markets (93.9% accuracy, 1074 trades) and strong Trump/US performance (71.7%, 467 trades), generating $6.69M in realized PnL. However, outside these two domains, they are one of the worst performers in the dataset at 9.2% accuracy on 487 trades — signals in 'Other' markets should be faded, not followed. The recent Harris drop-out losses reveal a concerning pattern of doubling-down into losing positions across 15 consecutive trades on the same market. Follow this trader closely in Russia_UKR and Trump_US; treat any other signal as anti-correlated with the correct answer.
